body_transformation: The stocky, muscular build retains its low stance and quadrupedal structure, now with electric blue fur that shimmers with neon green circuit patterns tracing along the limbs and spine. The black-tipped ears and tail gain jagged, lightning-bolt shaped spines along their edges, while the paw gloves transform into sharp, angular metallic plates with sparking yellow accents. The feline face maintains its long whiskers, but the fur texture becomes sleek and wiry, with glowing yellow sparks flickering at the tips of the whiskers and tail. Deep electric blue fur covers the body, overlaid with vibrant yellow lightning streaks that pulse faintly with energy.
signature_feature: Tail tip: jagged lightning-bolt spines with neon green circuit patterns and sparking yellow energy trails.
